---
title: "Support"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<!--Please delete or replace with your own clarity-->
{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}

We acknowledge the support of the following grant funders:

- ClimateWorks Foundation
- Environmental Defense Fund
- National Science Foundation
- New York State Department of Environmental Conservation
- Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory
- University of California, Berkeley
- Stanford University
- Stony Brook University
- Baruch College, City University of New York
- Asia Society
- California China Climate Institute
- World Resources Institute

We appreciate the support of the following institutions:

- [CUNY Institute for Demographic Research](https://www.cuny.edu/about/centers-and-institutes/demographic-research/)
- [Marxe School of Public and International Affairs](https://marxe.baruch.cuny.edu/)
- [CUNY Climate Consortium](https://www.cuny.edu/research/research-development-programs/cuny-climate-consortium/)



## Contact us

<center>

**Deep Policy Lab**

E-mail: <energy.climatechange@gmail.com>


</center>
